review_body_text: I enjoyed working at CIMB, I leave behind my last job because in order to enhance my skill set , I am looking for better opportunities.
People in cimb is cooperative and able to work as a team. They can manage their task even under pressure.working in cimb is very good to gain experience and knowledge in banking sector
staff too friendly and easy to comunicate regarding the work and helpful in the task given. the job always under pressure work.

review_title: enjoyable as the job requires teamwork
review_body_text: It is a desk job whereby we deal with clients via various communication platforms. Throughout the years we have developed our soft skills and knowledge as the management has been very supportive in term of providing in-house training as well as instilling mentorship culture in guiding new staff. Teamwork is the core substance to ensure success and error-free operations.
pros_text: tv room and water dispenser are provided
cons_text: must be alert all the time

review_body_text: A work day start with full of energy.I learned a lot of things from this work because this work give me a lot of experience such as dedication,group activities and so on.The management give full support to the employees.My co-workers all give me support and help me when the time needed. Sometimes I need to work with stress but I will try to finish my work.My management arrange dinner to the employees in 6 month once.
Great management and environment working place. Have to chase the sale target every month but can go for vacation every year.

-Working during office hours -selling insurance products -management too busy to forget there are new employees who have entered. -personal other colleagues are very nice and friendly. -when encouraging to be able to work with colleagues who are friendly and nice.
pros_text: When there was a meeting with teammate will be eating for free. Can work out to look for sale.
cons_text: good medical benefits, loan with low interest rate.

review_body_text: Daily submission of loan application & account disbursement in the hire purchase department. I am very familiar on the credit rating of customer in order to make a fast decision. Management will be update latest term of underwriting to meet the market challenge. All the colleague work as team to achieve the department target. Hardest Part of the job is to compete with the other financial institution without neglecting the banking & financial responsibility guideline. The most enjoyable part is when the department deliver the figue & meet the target assigned.
pros_text: Employee benefit on staff loan & medical

review_body_text: I have been working for a total of 31 years in banking industry, It is a time for me to venture into other field.The banking industry has changed a lot. Transactions can be done thru on line
a.Overall experience is good and Friendly nature. b. The way the team lead and manager behave is awesome. c. Good to learn lot of new things.

review_title: productive can work in team and quick learner
review_body_text: i learn on how to advising people of awareness for their savings and retirement plan at cimb. the hardest part or the challenging in this company is to meet the prospect and to comfort their
Colleagues and managements were ready to assist and guide new comers. Overall working condition was fine. However the salary offered was slightly unfavorable.

No work life balance. When working in banks, you should expect to spend yourself to sacrifice your energy and time to focus on work, to stay back late while little you can get in return. The management is pretty hands off. They'd like to push the staff to finish up a lot of works in a short time by hook or by crook. Co-workers are some team players but some just like to complaint without doing nothing. Working in banking industry is supposed to be the most enjoyable things in life but it becomes miserable especially for the contract staff when the contract is ended without strong and valid reason. Therefore, no career enhancement is promoted in CIMB.
cons_text: Lack of career enhancement opportunity, political issue

review_body_text: enjoying the work, caller customer and ask to pay their money back, learn lot of things,the hardest job is to conveince the costumer.

review_title: Great people and nice place to work
review_body_text: Always get prepared. Always strive to be the BEST in what we do and an environment of trust and self disciplined to produced extra ordinary result The most enjoyable the realistic expectation on benefits,salary and bonuses
A lot of friend and happy friend, working environment not bad, working hours is very fix, no benefit, unhappy working at cimb

When i was new, most of the sales that i managed to done deal are being eye-ed by colleague. They will offer you a small amount of money in exchange of giving them the sales. if you refuse, they will never want to guide u in future, and won't even smile at you anymore. This will make u feel uncomfortable, clueless, and unable to hit your monthly sales target. Workload is a lot that you could only get home at 7pm everyday. During peak season, you might be home at 9pm. The good thing is you are not underpaid (what to expect if you have no previous professional working experience), and training provided even though they won't be able to cover on everything in detail. Boss/Manager is really helpful, responsible, kind and friendly.

A typical at work- depending on how busy the project. if project dateline nearing completion so there will be free time and vice versa. What i have learned - .Many things for example do not just expect co-workers to give guidance but instead I had to go and ask them in order to be a professional employee. Another thing always practice by think outside the box . Management - Management is not so well-organized and flexible Co-workers - Some co-workers can be discussed and communicate to a good no matter in terms of employment and social areas.

review_title: Great experience with top bank in Malaysia
review_body_text: I was working with supportive colleague and good guidance from superior. Any contact centre might stressful, here they have fun club with activities. The most enjoyable is I had opportunity to join in sports and outdoor activity. Futsal lead me until CIMB Sea Games 2010 then champion trip to oversea as a reward.

Repetitive daily tasks which easily get my jobs on hands. Communication cross department to get the jobs and problems done and solve. Lack of sharing knowledge and information among colleagues leads to find solutions which helps me to gain more learning and knowledge.
pros_text: Can go back on time upon finishing your daily tasks
cons_text: Lack of team groups within co workers
